It’s a pet peeve when a PC game dumps you into the opening without letting you adjust settings first. I absolutely cannot relax and enjoy a game until I’ve adjusted settings first.

data.body:
"Closer to Fine" is the signature 1989 folk-rock hit by the Indigo Girls, written by Emily Saliers.

It explores the search for life’s meaning, concluding that embracing uncertainty brings peace, rather than seeking a single "definitive" answer. 

#womeninmusic
